# PF & Co Construction
> AI-powered structural engineering, construction, and site intelligence services across Surrey, London, and the South East of England.

## About
PF & Co Construction is an engineering-led construction firm specialising in structural design, precision construction, and data-driven site intelligence. We combine AI-optimised design tools with hands-on engineering expertise to deliver safer, faster, and more cost-effective outcomes. ICE registered, PI insured, with 24-hour turnaround on quotes.

## Services

### Structural Engineering
Residential and commercial structural design, beam calculations (RSJ/steel), basement impact assessments, and load-bearing wall removals.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/structural-engineering

### Construction
Engineering-led construction services including structural alterations, extensions, loft conversions, and basement builds.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/construction

### Site Intelligence
Data-driven pre-construction screening reports interrogating 15+ authoritative data sources. Reports include:
- Flood Risk Assessment (£295)
- Geotechnical Desk Study (£345)
- Site Feasibility Report (£495)
- Biodiversity Net Gain Screening (£345)
- Construction Management Plan (£345)
- Design and Access Statement (£445)
- Energy Statement (£345)
- Feasibility Study (£895)
- Heritage Impact Assessment (£445)
- Parking Survey (£245)
- Planning Statement (£445)
- Pre-Application Advice Pack (£345)
- Pre-Construction Design Review (£545)
- Transport Statement (£345)
- Tree Survey (£395)
- Full Site Intelligence Bundle (£830)
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/site-intelligence
Order: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/order-report

### AI Innovation
54-agent AI workforce and generative structural design tools that optimise safety and reduce material waste.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/ai-innovation

### Subscriptions
Engineering as a Service — unlimited structural calculations and priority design support for a fixed monthly fee.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/subscriptions
